column1: ## - mean_chronos_*: mean Chronos score across RMS cell lines (lower = more essential; <-0.5 = essential, <-1.0 = strongly essential)
## - pct_essential: fraction of RMS lines where Chronos < -0.5
## - dependency_score: bounded 0..1 derived from mean_chronos (1 = strongest dependency, 0 = no dependency)
## PROVENANCE: hand-curated v0.1 placeholder values consistent with published DepMap exploration of RMS lines
## (Dharia 2021 Pediatric DepMap; Olanich 2015 CDK4 RMS; Crose 2012 FGFR4; Gryder 2017 BRD4; Marjon 2016 PRMT5/MTAP).
## REPLACE with a real DepMap 24Q2+ pull (CRISPR_(DepMapPublic)_v.csv filtered to RMS lineage) before any scientific claim.
## Cell lines targeted in the real pull: RD, RH4, RH5, RH18, RH30, RH41, SJCRH30, SMS-CTR, CW9019, RMS13, A-204, TE441-T (FP and FN RMS, ~12 lines).
